prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 安徽大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第101名，近年排名在90–104之间波动，整 体处于全国中上水平；2023年高考周期内曾因师德师风事件获偏负面评价，但距今已较久；抖音综合热度排名第84位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等，未出 现明显报考关注升温信号；无投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中安徽大学无A-及以上学科，整体学科实力以B类为主，在211高校中处于中等水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业中计算机类（软件工程、人工智能、信息安全等）社会热度高热推荐，电子信息/通信类（通信工程、光电信息等）高热推荐，电气/自动化类（自动化 、智能制造等）高热推荐，这些热门专业集中度高，对报考热度有推升作用；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年计划大幅扩招约76.9%、本省物理类考生增加约19.7%、热门工科专业集中度高推升报考热度等因素，供需弹性计算显示位次将大幅后 移；预测2026年最低位次约23369名，区间22869–23869名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were 16247 → 33583 → 14145 → 12979 → 15853 respectively. In 2022, an abnormally high ranking occurred due to changes in the provincial control line. In the past three years, it fluctuated within the range of 12979–15853, with a baseline of approximately 15853 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi Physics Category was 58 students in 2021–2022, 69 students in 2023–2024, 65 students in 2025, and a significant expansion to 115 students in 2026, an increase of about 76.9% compared to 2025. This substantial expansion theoretically intensifies competition and increases the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Anhui University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 101st, with recent rankings fluctuating between 90 and 104, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. During the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, it received somewhat negative evaluations due to a teacher ethics incident, but this is now relatively old. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 84th, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure and no clear signal of increased application attention. There are no records of admission gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Anhui University has no disciplines rated A- or above, with overall discipline strength mainly at the B level, placing it at a medium level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the majors in Physics Category, computer-related majors (Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Information Security, etc.) are highly recommended with high social popularity, electronics/communication majors (Communication Engineering, Optoelectronic Information, etc.) are highly recommended, and electrical/automation majors (Automation, Intelligent Manufacturing, etc.) are highly recommended. These popular majors are highly concentrated, which boosts application enthusiasm. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant enrollment expansion of about 76.9% in 2026, the increase of about 19.7% in local Physics Category examinees, and the high concentration of popular engineering majors boosting application enthusiasm, supply-demand elasticity calculations show a substantial backward shift in rankings. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 23,369, with a range of 22,869–23,869.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (22,869–23,869), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<22,869), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Software Engineering and Artificial Intelligence. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>23,869), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 majors and avoid discouraged majors like Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials.
